dictionary.name: project
dictionary.words: <<<<<<< HEAD Aracne <<<<<<< HEAD Guidonia ======= >>>>>>> d8d02b0 (refactor: project dictionary) Morioka Profilazione Salvataggio Sistema Sistemi Sotterranea <<<<<<< HEAD Specialista Specializzato Specializzazioni Spettacolo Strategie Strumenti Struttura Suono Superamento ======= Struttura >>>>>>> d8d02b0 (refactor: project dictionary) botcheck dell'IA dell'ia ======= Morioka botcheck dell'IA <<<<<<< HEAD >>>>>>> cdce55a (feat(projects): add projects page, EN/IT locales, and game assets) ======= dell'ia >>>>>>> fd0479e (fix(dictionaries): order) devicon extracurriculare hCaptcha hcaptcha immersiva replyto <<<<<<< HEAD sottomoduli ======= >>>>>>> d8d02b0 (refactor: project dictionary) tarabili
